questions.question: A mobile application is designed to track the daily activity of a user. Determine the functional requirements of the application. (5 marks)
A software system is required to process a large volume of transactions per day. Determine one nonfunctional requirement that this system must satisfy. (5 marks)
An online banking system is expected to be accessible from anywhere in the world. Determine two functional requirements that this system must satisfy. (10 marks)
questions.hint: Provide enough details to answer the question
